opinion.h: BAKER v. WALTER BAKER & CO., 168 U.S. 712 (1898)
BAKER v. WALTER BAKER & CO., Limited. No. 534.
opinion.p: Holmes Conrad and R. T. Barton, for petitioner.
No opinion. Petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States circuit court of appeals for the Fourth circuit denied. See 27 C. C. A. 396, 83 Fed. 3.
